privileged_info_summary: The task configures Jitsi Meet version stable-9753 to create a Focus Mode interface. The custom configuration file is located at /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/custom-interface_config.js. The APP_NAME is set to 'ExamPortal'. All 8 allowed toolbar buttons (microphone, camera, desktop, fullscreen, hangup, raisehand, chat, tileview) and all 7 forbidden buttons (invite, security, videoquality, filmstrip, shortcuts, stats, settings) are valid Jitsi Meet button identifiers according to official documentation. The data is synthetic task configuration values, not drawn from external datasets.
